title: Stitch-backed design contract
acceptance_criteria: Stitch MCP generated a usable design system and local spec records project/screen/design-system IDs.

title: Theme and shared component polish
acceptance_criteria: Theme tokens, cards, buttons, inputs, chips, and empty states match the minimal calm style without changing business behavior.
notes: Verified by dart analyze and flutter test.

title: Home dashboard polish
acceptance_criteria: Home shows a calm dashboard, nearest countdown, review days, monitor entry, and sorted countdown list; existing home tests pass.
notes: Verified by test/home_page_test.dart and full flutter test.

title: Monitoring and hit-record polish
acceptance_criteria: Monitor source list and hit feed remain functional, searchable, linked, and visually cleaner; existing monitor tests pass.
notes: Verified by test/monitor_pages_test.dart and full flutter test.

title: Settings polish
acceptance_criteria: Settings is grouped and readable; about dialog and clear-data flow still pass tests.
notes: Verified by test/settings_page_test.dart and full flutter test.

title: Verification and delivery
acceptance_criteria: dart analyze, flutter test, and flutter build apk are run; relevant files are committed on UI-polish.
notes: Verification passed; committed in UI polish delivery.
